current_focus: Site is live at ccarvel.github.io/warren-jekyll-site. Repo needs to be transferred to Warren's GitHub account. Remaining content/metadata cleanup still open.
exact_next_step: Follow migrating.md step-by-step to transfer the repo to Warren's GitHub account: initiate the transfer at github.com/ccarvel/warren-jekyll-site/settings → Danger Zone → Transfer repository, entering Warren's GitHub username as destination.

blockers.description: Repo is still under ccarvel's account. Warren's GitHub username is needed to initiate transfer. See migrating.md for full steps.

open_tasks: Transfer repo to Warren's GitHub account (see migrating.md)
Update url: and baseurl: in _config.yml after transfer
completed_this_session: Renamed GitHub repo from jekyll-site-theme to warren-jekyll-site

Updated git remote origin to https://github.com/ccarvel/warren-jekyll-site (commit b3b2568)

Added .nojekyll to stop GitHub Pages from re-running Jekyll on pre-built site (commit 6f5cfe5)
Expanded _config.yml exclude: list to keep source/tooling files out of _site/ (commit 6f5cfe5)
Created orphan gh-pages branch and enabled GitHub Pages (branch: gh-pages, folder: /)
Fixed broken image paths in _writers/adisa.md and _writers/brand.md (commit 8fbace6)
Added writers collection loop to sidebar with section label (commit 04446c3)
